시편 70:1.content: Hurry, God, to deliver me. Come quickly to help me, Yahweh.

시편 70:2.content: Let them be disappointed and confounded who seek my soul. Let those who desire my ruin be turned back in disgrace.

시편 70:3.content: Let them be turned because of their shame who say, “Aha! Aha!”

시편 70:4.content: Let all those who seek you rejoice and be glad in you. Let those who love your salvation continually say, “Let God be exalted!”

시편 70:5.content: But I am poor and needy. Come to me quickly, God. You are my help and my deliverer. Yahweh, don’t delay.
